title: dryopteris mongolica
intro: Dryopteris mongolica is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris mongolica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
